title: thoth Helm chart
description: Helm chart for deploying thoth (Slack daemon + MCP server + Hindsight index + cron)

config.description: Non-secret thoth configuration. These are rendered into a

allowedGithubUsers.description: Comma-separated allow-list of GitHub usernames permitted to

analyseModel.description: Optional override model for the analyse/kind/transcription call. Empty = use anthropicModel.

anthropicModel.description: Default Anthropic model for thoth's LLM calls.

dailyLlmBudget.description: Daily LLM spend budget (USD) per Europe/London day. Empty = chart default unset.

diagramModel.description: Optional override model for the Excalidraw diagram call. Empty = use anthropicModel.

gitBranch.description: Git branch the vault wrappers push/pull against.

gitRemote.description: Git remote name the vault wrappers push/pull against.

githubOauthClientId.description: GitHub OAuth App client id for MCP OAuth 2.1 login. Empty

intentModel.description: Optional override model for the intent gate. Empty = use anthropicModel.

logLevel.description: Log level for the thoth daemons.

mcpAllowedHosts.description: Comma-separated Host header allow-list for the MCP server

mcpAllowedOrigins.description: Comma-separated Origin allow-list for the MCP server.

oauthServerUrl.description: Public base URL of the MCP OAuth server (no trailing slash),

obsidianVaultName.description: Obsidian vault name (the vault folder / app display name).

pkmVault.description: Vault path inside the container (mount point of the vault PVC).

thothHome.description: THOTH_HOME path inside the container (mount point of the home PVC).

vaultRepoUrl.description: HTTPS URL of the vault git repo, used by the vault-bootstrap

global.description: Global values shared between all subcharts
global.$comment: Added automatically by 'helm schema' to allow this chart to be used as a Helm dependency, as the `additionalProperties` setting would otherwise collide with Helm's special 'global' values key.

databaseUrl.description: External Postgres URL for Hindsight. When set, Hindsight uses

llmModel.description: Hindsight LLM model for fact extraction.

llmProvider.description: Hindsight LLM provider for fact extraction.

pgDataDir.description: Mount point for the embedded Hindsight Postgres data directory.

port.description: Port the Hindsight API listens on.

pullPolicy.description: Image pull policy for the Hindsight image.

resources.description: Resource requests/limits for the Hindsight pod.

workerId.description: Stable Hindsight worker id (keeps the bank attributable across restarts).

image.description: Container image for the thoth Slack/MCP/cron workloads.

tag.description: Image tag. The deploying overlay pins this to a release tag.

ingress.description: Optional ingress exposing the MCP Service (bearer-auth at the app).

enabled.description: Whether to create an Ingress for the MCP Service.

host.description: Public host for the MCP endpoint. The deploying overlay sets this.

enabled.description: Whether to enable TLS on the Ingress.

secretName.description: Name of the TLS Secret. The deploying overlay sets this.

port.description: Container/Service port the MCP server listens on.

nameOverride.description: Override the chart name used in resource names.

nodeSelector.description: Node placement. Default pins to amd64 (the image is single-arch).

podSecurityContext.description: Pod-level securityContext applied to every workload.

resources.description: Resource requests/limits applied to the thoth workloads.

secretName.description: Name of the pre-existing (e.g. SealedSecret-managed) Secret

securityContext.description: Container-level securityContext applied to every workload.

storage.description: Persistent storage for the vault, the thoth home, and the

pg0.description: The embedded Hindsight Postgres data PVC. Only created when

accessMode.description: Access mode for the Hindsight Postgres PVC.

size.description: Requested size for the Hindsight Postgres PVC.

storageClassName.description: StorageClass for the Hindsight Postgres PVC. Empty = cluster default.

thothHome.description: The THOTH_HOME state PVC (.env, runtime state, budget ledger).

accessMode.description: Access mode for the thoth-home PVC.

size.description: Requested size for the thoth-home PVC.

storageClassName.description: StorageClass for the thoth-home PVC. Empty = cluster default.

vault.description: The Obsidian/PKM vault working tree PVC (RWO, one writer).

accessMode.description: Access mode for the vault PVC.

size.description: Requested size for the vault PVC.

storageClassName.description: StorageClass for the vault PVC. Empty = cluster default.
